title: pavonia immitis
intro: Pavonia immitis, also known as Rose Mallow or Pavonia, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Pavonia immitis include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antiviral and antibacterial activities. In herbal preparations, Pavonia immitis is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is also used in topical applications to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing.
